title: Chat
disclaimer: AI hai — doctor nahi. Dawai ke baare mein doctor se poochein.
emptyState: Koi sawaal hai? Sugar, BP, ya khaane ke baare mein poochein.
rateLimit: Aaj 3 baar baat ho chuki — kal phir poochein 🙂
safetyRejected: Yeh sawaal doctor se poochna best rahega.
offlineSend: Internet aane par message bhej diya jayega.
offlineBanner: Offline — chat ke liye internet chahiye.
emergencySkip: Pehle critical alert handle karein. Doctor ko abhi call karein.
flagConfirm: Aapne is message ko flag kiya. Hum review karenge. Dhanyavaad 🙏
typingTimeout: AI thodi der le raha hai — phir try karein
loadError: Chat load nahi hua. Phir try karein.

reasons.medical_advice: Dawai ya ilaaj ki salah di
reasons.disrespectful: Aadar ke saath baat nahi ki
